message:
fix(ast/display): drop stray space before column list in CREATE INDEX pretty-printer

`Display for CreateIndexStatement` was emitting `CREATE INDEX name ON
"tbl" (col1, col2)` with an extra space between the table name and the
opening paren. SQLite itself round-trips this form without the space —
`CREATE INDEX name ON "tbl"(col1, col2)` — and conformance tests that
re-parse our pretty-printed output were carrying a one-character drift
that masked unrelated diffs. Switch the literal from `" ("` to `"("`
so the printer matches SQLite's canonical form.
